headline: 暑期档预热：痴迷领跑，福尔摩斯小姐3回归
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：新片《痴迷》持续霸榜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》热度攀升，暑期档多部大片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: 'Obsession' continues to dominate, 'Enola Holmes 3' gains traction, and multiple summer blockbusters are on the horizon.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》本周热度飙升，新预告引热议。
industryHighlights.en: 'Supergirl' surges in weekly trends, new trailer sparks buzz.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》确认进入前期制作。
